hero_subtitle: SFTY connects onboarding and KYB provider outputs to organize UBO risk assessments into auditable workflows with case escalation and evidence preservation for compliance teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Ubo risk assessment lacks consistent structure
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with fragmented data from multiple sources during UBO risk reviews. This leads to slow escalation, inconsistent decisions and gaps in auditability across onboarding workflows for beneficial ownership checks.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates UBO data, provider results, risk rules and reviewer actions into one structured workflow so compliance teams manage escalation, document decisions and preserve audit evidence consistently.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to UBO risk review
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs through risk rules, review workflows, case escalation and evidence collection for structured UBO risk assessment.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond disconnected reviews. One UBO risk layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects UBO provider outputs into structured risk reviews, escalation workflows, decisions, and audit-ready evidence tailored for digital asset onboarding compliance.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in managing beneficial ownership risk with structured provider orchestration, audit-grade evidence preservation and deployment control for compliance assurance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support UBO risk review in onboarding workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how UBO data integrates into risk-based reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports UBO compliance decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for UBO verification and escalation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for UBO risk review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures UBO risk assessment by connecting KYB checks, corporate data and sanctions outputs into auditable workflows tailored for VASP compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage UBO risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes provider results through configurable rules to open cases, assign reviews, escalate risks and document decisions on beneficial ownership.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve UBO review evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, provider outputs and case evidence to support a clear audit trail for UBO risk reviews and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our KYC and KYB stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects existing KYC and KYB providers without disruption, connecting their outputs within one operational compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing onboarding providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above providers and does not replace identity, corporate or screening services.
final_title: Structure UBO risk reviews into auditable cases
final_description: Review how SFTY connects onboarding and KYB outputs into controlled workflows with case escalation and preserved evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
